description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Django CQRS Library that triggers on push with any tag. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.8, install dependencies from requirements files and specific packages, lint the code with flake8, run tests with python setup.py test, adjust the coverage report for Sonar, analyze the code with SonarCloud, wait for report processing, verify the SonarQube quality gate, and publish the package to PyPI using twine with credentials from secrets.
